---
title: "Hello"
---

Binh Vu (pronounced like the (bad) search engine). senior at [Lawrence University](https://www.lawrence.edu/), will probably be in grad school soon.

[About](about.qmd) has a little more history about me, and [Things](things.qmd) reveal my impeccable taste.

Currently taking: [Modern Regression](regress.qmd), [Advanced Data Computing](datacomp.qmd), and [Numerical Analysis](numana.qmd).

::: {.contact-links}
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:vub@lawrence.edu)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vub23/)
:::
